data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred.

data.name: ReportNotFound
data.value: The specified report was not found.

data.name: SanctionNotFound
data.value: The specified sanction was not found.

data.name: SelfReportNotAllowed
data.value: A user cannot report themselves.

data.name: DuplicatePendingReport
data.value: A pending report already exists between these two users.

data.name: InvalidSanctionDuration
data.value: The sanction duration cannot be negative.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: UsernameAlreadyTaken
data.value: The specified username is already taken.

data.name: EmailAlreadyTaken
data.value: The specified email is already registered.

data.name: InvalidInstitutionalEmail
data.value: The email must be a valid institutional (.edu.pe) email address.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: The specified user was not found.

data.name: SelfSessionNotAllowed
data.value: A user cannot request a tutoring session with themselves.

data.name: PendingSessionAlreadyExists
data.value: You already have a pending tutoring request with this tutor.

data.name: SelfDonationNotAllowed
data.value: A user cannot donate to themselves.

data.name: SessionNotFound
data.value: The specified session was not found.

data.name: SessionNotCompleted
data.value: Reviews can only be left for a completed session.

data.name: ReviewerNotSessionLearner
data.value: Only the learner of this session can leave a review for it.

data.name: TutorMismatch
data.value: The specified tutor does not match this session's tutor.

data.name: NotSessionParticipant
data.value: You are not a participant of this session.

data.name: InvalidSessionStatus
data.value: That status change is not allowed for this session.

data.name: ReporterNotSessionParticipant
data.value: You can only report a session you were part of.

data.name: ReportedUserNotSessionParticipant
data.value: The reported user must be the other participant of the referenced session.

data.name: LearnerNotSessionParticipant
data.value: You are not the learner of the specified session.

data.name: NoCompletedSessionWithTutor
data.value: You need a completed session with this tutor before you can donate to them.

data.name: NotTutorOwner
data.value: You can only update your own tutor profile.

data.name: NotProfileOwner
data.value: You can only update your own profile.

data.name: NotYourTurn
data.value: It is not your turn to propose a new date for this session.

data.name: OnlyTutorCanShareQuiz
data.value: Only the tutor can share a quiz in this session.
